notes_for_human_reviewer: NOVICE — the generic mass thank-you that does none of the actual work. No specific reconnect to Dembe, no congratulation to Maya, and crucially it re-buries Sam's credit ('the PC team did a fantastic job on the dashboards') instead of naming Sam — four_qualities and step_forward_judgment floor at 1. Worse, it capitulates to the toxic peer: 'happy to chat about teaming up... I'll mention it to the director' — boundary_with_toxic floors at 1 (vouching despite the known pattern). sincerity 2 (warm but specific-free/performative), register 2. Tests whether the grader penalises a pleasant, well-meant note that misses every real move and walks straight into the toxic-peer trap.
